description: You are a Sales Manager at a wholesale distribution company. Your team needs an automated workflow to fast-track high-value opportunities so senior reps can engage with them sooner. Create an active Workflow rule in SuiteCRM named 'Auto-Qualify High-Value Prospects' for the Opportunities module. Configure the workflow to run 'Always' on 'All Records' when the 'Amount' is greater than or equal to 50000 and the 'Sales Stage' is 'Prospecting'. The workflow must include a 'Modify Record' action named 'Advance to Qualification' that sets the 'Sales Stage' to 'Qualification'.
